summary: Tested Multi-Country Comparison feature and All Taxes Display. Backend: 12/12 tests PASSED - all APIs working correctly with 54 countries. Frontend: Multi-Country Comparison tab fully functional with all taxes displayed (D.D, TVA, CEDEAO, CISS, TPI, PRCT, etc.). Standard Calculator tab has known Select component state issue from iteration_12.

ui_bugs.issue: KNOWN ISSUE from iteration_12: Select components for origin/destination country do not properly update React state. When selecting different countries, both may show same value or state doesn't sync with UI.
ui_bugs.workaround: Use Multi-Country Comparison tab which works correctly

action_items: PRIORITY: Fix Select component state binding in CalculatorTab.jsx (lines 497, 513)
Consider using the same Badge-based selection approach as MultiCountryComparison component
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-Country Comparison feature is well implemented with region grouping and visual comparison
All taxes are properly displayed with codes (D.D, TVA, CEDEAO, CISS, TPI, etc.) and labels
Standard Calculator Select component state issue persists from iteration_12

success_rate.frontend: Multi-Country Comparison: 100% working | Standard Calculator: Select state issue persists

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using 54 authentic JSON tariff files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Country Comparison feature is fully functional. Backend returns 54 countries via /api/authentic-tariffs/countries. Each country calculation returns taxes_detail array with all taxes (D.D, TVA, CEDEAO, CISS, TPI, PRCT, T.C.S, AIR, etc.). The standard Calculator tab has a persistent Select component state issue where selecting countries doesn't properly update React state variables originCountry and destinationCountry. Use MultiCountryComparison for testing tariff calculations until Select issue is fixed.

multi_country_comparison.details: Tab visible, country badges selectable by region, Compare button triggers API calls, results table shows all taxes with codes, best choice highlighted, bar and radar charts display correctly

all_taxes_display.details: Taxes displayed with codes and labels: D.D (Droit de Douane), TVA (Taxe sur la Valeur Ajoutée), CEDEAO, CISS, TPI, PRCT, T.C.S, AIR, etc.

countries_api.details: Returns 54 African countries with enhanced_v2 data format

calculate_api.details: Returns NPF vs ZLECAf calculations with taxes_detail, fiscal_advantages, administrative_formalities

categories_tested: Countries list - 3 tests (54 countries, required fields, enhanced_v2 format)
Taxes detail with labels - 3 tests (Morocco, Nigeria, Algeria taxes)
Calculate endpoint - 3 tests (NPF vs ZLECAf, fiscal advantages, formalities)
Multi-country comparison - 2 tests (5 countries parallel, each has taxes_detail)

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: Standard Calculator Select components don't update state properly
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: shadcn/ui Select component onValueChange callback not properly syncing with React useState. When user selects a country, the UI may show selection but state variables remain empty or show wrong value.
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: 1. Multi-Country Comparison works (uses Badge clicks, not Select). 2. Calculator form shows selections visually but state doesn't trigger API call. 3. Both origin and destination may show same country.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction_steps: 1. Go to Calculator tab (not Comparison). 2. Click origin country select and choose a country. 3. Click destination country select and choose different country. 4. Enter HS code and value. 5. Click Calculate. 6. Observe: No results appear because validation fails on empty state.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Option 1: Debug shadcn Select component binding. Option 2: Replace with Badge-based selection like MultiCountryComparison. Option 3: Use native HTML select element.
